title: 2026年最佳 慈善 遗产捐赠 与 计划捐赠 工具 2026年
description: 2026年最佳 慈善 遗产捐赠 与 计划捐赠 工具 2026年 comparison for 2026: Top platforms, pricing, features & ROI. Cut costs 20-30%, boost efficiency 25-40% for business. Ideal for modern operations.
content:
2026年最佳慈善 遗产捐赠 与 计划捐赠 工具

Legacy giving 解决 planned contribution needs of 寻求 long-term donor commitments. Planned giving tools 启用 bequest facilitation, legacy program management, and planned gift administration that creates sustainable organizational funding. 在2026年, planned giving platforms 已经演进 to provide 全面的 legacy giving capabilities that facilitate long-term donor commitments.

The Planned Giving Imperative for Nonprofit Sustainability

Long-term funding addresses sustainability needs, with planned gifts that provide future organizational funding. Organizations benefit from planned gifts that create sustainable revenue streams. Planned giving tools 启用 long-term funding, 支持ing organizational sustainability. These planned giving capabilities 支持 future funding.

Bequest facilitation addresses estate giving needs, with processes that 启用 donors to include organizations in estate plans. Organizations need 系统的 bequest facilitation. Planned giving tools 启用 bequest processes, 支持ing estate giving. These bequest capabilities 支持 planned contributions.

Legacy program management addresses 系统的 planned giving administration, with programs that manage planned gift commitments. Organizations need 系统的 planned giving programs. Planned giving tools 启用 program management, 支持ing legacy administration. These program capabilities 支持 planned gift oversight.

Donor stewardship addresses planned gift donor relationships, with ongoing stewardship that maintains planned giving commitments. Organizations need stewardship for planned gift donors. Planned giving tools 启用 stewardship, 支持ing legacy donor relationships. These stewardship capabilities 支持 planned donor engagement.

Leading Legacy Giving Platforms Reviewed

1. LegacyPlanner

LegacyPlanner has established itself as a 全面的 planned giving platform, providing bequest facilitation, legacy program management, and planned gift administration tools. The 平台解决 estate giving, planned gift tracking, and legacy donor stewardship through unified system. This 全面的ness makes LegacyPlanner suitable for 寻求 系统的 planned giving management.

The bequest module 启用s estate giving facilitation, with tools for facilitating bequest commitments. Organizations can facilitate bequests, enabling estate gifts. The platform handles bequest facilitation, 支持ing planned gifts. These bequest capabilities 启用 estate contributions.

LegacyPlanner's program features 启用 legacy program administration, with tools for managing planned giving programs. Organizations can administer legacy programs, managing planned gifts. The platform handles program management, 支持ing planned giving oversight. These program capabilities 启用 系统的 administration.

The tracking features 启用 planned gift monitoring, with visibility into planned gift commitments and status. Organizations can track planned gifts, understanding legacy commitments. The platform handles planned gift tracking, providing legacy visibility. These tracking capabilities 支持 planned gift oversight.

The stewardship features 启用 legacy donor engagement, with tools for stewarding planned gift donors. Organizations can steward legacy donors, maintaining planned gift relationships. The platform handles legacy stewardship, 支持ing planned donor engagement. These stewardship capabilities 启用 legacy donor relationships.

LegacyPlanner offers pricing based on planned giving program scope and organizational needs, with options accessible for moderate legacy programs and scaling for 全面的 planned giving. Organizations seeking 系统的 planned giving may find LegacyPlanner's breadth 提供 appropriate capability.

2. PlannedGiving Pro

PlannedGiving Pro positions itself as a planned giving platform emphasizing planned gift administration efficiency. The platform 提供 tools for efficient planned gift processing and administration. This efficiency focus makes PlannedGiving Pro suitable for 寻求 streamlined planned giving operations.

The administration module 启用s efficient planned gift processing, with tools for processing planned gifts efficiently. Organizations can process planned gifts efficiently, streamlining administration. The platform handles planned gift administration, 支持ing efficient processing. These administration capabilities 启用 streamlined operations.

PlannedGiving Pro's gift types features 启用 diverse planned gift handling, with 支持 for various planned gift types including bequests, charitable remainder trusts, and gift annuities. Organizations can handle diverse planned gifts, 支持ing multiple gift types. The platform handles gift type management, 支持ing planned gift variety. These gift type capabilities 启用 diverse planned giving.

The documentation features 启用 planned gift record-keeping, with tools for documenting planned gift details. Organizations can document planned gifts, creating 全面的 records. The platform handles planned gift documentation, 支持ing record-keeping. These documentation capabilities 启用 planned gift records.

The communication features 启用 planned gift donor contact, with tools for communicating with planned gift donors. Organizations can communicate with planned gift donors, maintaining relationships. The platform handles planned gift communication, 支持ing donor contact. These communication capabilities 启用 planned donor engagement.

PlannedGiving Pro offers pricing based on planned giving administration efficiency and organizational needs, with options representing streamlined processing capability. Organizations seeking efficient planned giving may find PlannedGiving Pro's efficiency focus 提供 appropriate capability.

3. BequestBuilder

BequestBuilder has established itself as a planned giving platform with emphasis on bequest program building. The platform 提供 tools for building organizational bequest programs that create planned giving opportunities. This bequest focus makes BequestBuilder suitable for 寻求 to establish and grow bequest programs.

The bequest building module 启用s program creation, with tools for building organizational bequest programs. Organizations can build bequest programs, creating planned giving opportunities. The platform handles bequest program creation, 支持ing planned giving development. These building capabilities 启用 bequest program establishment.

BequestBuilder's outreach features 启用 bequest promotion, with tools for promoting bequest opportunities to donors. Organizations can promote bequests, encouraging planned gifts. The platform handles bequest outreach, 支持ing planned giving promotion. These outreach capabilities 启用 bequest marketing.

The education features 启用 donor planned giving education, with tools for educating donors about planned giving options. Organizations can educate donors, informing about planned gifts. The platform handles planned giving education, 支持ing donor information. These education capabilities 启用 donor planned giving awareness.

The tracking features 启用 bequest monitoring, with visibility into bequest commitments and progress. Organizations can track bequests, understanding planned gift status. The platform handles bequest tracking, providing planned gift visibility. These tracking capabilities 支持 bequest oversight.

BequestBuilder offers pricing based on bequest program building scope and organizational needs, with options representing bequest development capability. Organizations seeking bequest program growth may find BequestBuilder's bequest focus 提供 appropriate capability.

Planned Giving Platform Comparison Overview

Planned Giving Strategy for Nonprofit Organizations

Effective planned giving requires 战略性的 approach beyond platform selection. Organizations should develop planned giving plans that define legacy objectives, program priorities, and stewardship approaches. These plans guide platform configuration and ensure 系统的 planned giving. Organizations should consider donor demographics, legacy opportunities, and organizational sustainability when developing planned giving strategy.

Donor identification guides planned giving focus, with identification of donors suitable for planned giving cultivation. Organizations should identify planned giving prospects, directing cultivation efforts. Prospect identification improves planned giving 有效的ness. Organizations should identify planned giving candidates, guiding legacy focus.

Donor education 支持s planned giving awareness, with education that informs donors about planned giving options. Organizations should educate donors, building planned giving understanding. Education improves planned giving success. Organizations should implement planned giving education, 支持ing donor awareness.

Future Developments in Planned Giving Technology

Planned giving technology continues to evolve, incorporating new capabilities and adapting to changing donor estate planning preferences. Digital planned giving is advancing, with platforms enabling electronic planned gift documentation. Digital documentation improves planned giving efficiency, enabling streamlined processes. These digital capabilities 支持 modern planned giving.

Integrated estate planning is developing, with platforms connecting with estate planning professionals and tools. Integration improves planned gift facilitation, enabling coordinated estate planning. These integration capabilities 支持 全面的 planned giving. Organizations benefit from estate planning connections.

Automated stewardship is emerging, with platforms providing automated planned donor stewardship. Automated stewardship improves legacy donor engagement, ensuring 系统的 contact. These automation capabilities 支持 planned donor relationships. Organizations benefit from automated stewardship.

Analytics-based prospect identification is maturing, with platforms applying analytics that identify planned giving prospects. Analytics improves prospect identification, targeting appropriate donors. These analytics capabilities 支持 intelligent prospect finding. Organizations benefit from data-driven prospect identification.

As nonprofits evaluate planned giving options in 2026, the potential for sustainable funding is substantial. By selecting platforms aligned with planned giving needs and implementing 系统的 legacy programs, organizations can build planned giving programs that create long-term organizational funding.
